description: CompositionTeal blue and black plaid check shirt with beige accents, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a button on the elbow for rolling up the sleeves, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest, printed lettering on the right sleeve and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach Wash and dry inside outHang to dry in shadeMedium ironThe beige accents, printed lettering on the right sleeve and cleverly mitired pocket on the upper left chest adds rugged styling to this teal blue and black plaid shirt from turtle, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
